articles.description: From April 2–6, six Assassin's Creed titles; Unity, Syndicate, Origins, Odyssey, Valhalla, and Mirage, are available to play for free as part of Free Play Days.
articles.content: During this special instalment of Free Play Days –Assassins Creed Unity, Assassins Creed Syndicate, Assassins Creed Origins, Assassins Creed Odyssey, Assassins Creed Valhalla, and the introduction of… [+4615 chars]
